meanings.usage: 通常指铁路系统或火车轨道
指火车、地铁等的停靠站点
在火车站、旅馆等处帮人搬行李的人
表示明白某人的意思或某事的含义，过去式为understood
指再次说或做同样的事情
形容说话或表达清晰易懂
作动词时表示微笑，作名词时指微笑的表情
指通过学习获得知识或技能
作动词时指回答，作名词时指答案或回应
表示感到好奇或不确定
指人类交流用的语言系统

examples.en: I arrived in London at last.
I not only spoke English very carefully, but very clearly as well.
examples.zh: 我说英语不仅非常认真，而且非常清晰。

examples.en: I repeated my question several times.
examples.zh: 我把我的问题重复了好几次。

examples.en: He spoke neither slowly nor clearly.
examples.zh: 他说得既不慢也不清楚。

examples.en: The porter and I looked at each other and smiled.
examples.zh: 行李员和我互相看着对方，笑了。

examples.en: In England, each person speaks a different language.
examples.zh: 在英国，每个人说不同的语言。

examples.en: The English understand each other, but I don't understand them.
examples.zh: 英国人彼此能理解，但我却听不懂他们。

examples.en: I did not know the way to my hotel.
examples.zh: 我不知道去我酒店的路。
所以我向一个行李员询问。

grammar.title: not only...but (also)... 结构
grammar.definition: 表示不仅有某种情况，而且有另一种情况，强调两个方面的关联性。
grammar.structure: not only + 形容词/副词/动词 + but (also) + 形容词/副词/动词
grammar.usage: 用于强调不仅有某一特征，还有另一特征，also有时可省略。

examples.en: She is not only beautiful but also intelligent.
He not only reads but also writes.

grammar.title: neither...nor... 结构
grammar.definition: 表示既不...也不...，用于否定两个并列的事物或动作。
grammar.structure: neither + A + nor + B (A和B通常为相同的词性)
grammar.usage: 当连接两个主语时，谓语动词与靠近的主语一致（就近一致原则）。

examples.en: He is neither tall nor short.
She speaks neither French nor German.
examples.zh: 她既不会说法语也不会说德语。

grammar.title: 一般过去时态
grammar.definition: 表示过去发生的动作或存在的状态。
grammar.structure: 主语 + 动词过去式 + 其他
grammar.usage: 常与表示过去的时间状语连用，如yesterday, last week, at last等。

examples.en: I arrived in London at last.
I did not know the way to my hotel.
examples.zh: 我不知道去我酒店的路。

sentencePatterns.pattern: I did not know the way to + 地点, so I asked + 某人

original.en: I did not know the way to my hotel, so I asked a porter.
original.zh: 我不知道去我酒店的路，所以我向一个行李员询问。

imitations.en: I did not know the way to the station, so I asked a policeman.
imitations.zh: 我不知道去车站的路，所以我向警察询问。

imitations.en: I did not know the way to the museum, so I asked a local.
imitations.zh: 我不知道去博物馆的路，所以我向当地人询问。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + could not + 动词原形

original.en: The porter, however, could not understand me.
original.zh: 然而，那个行李员听不懂我说话。

imitations.en: She could not speak English at that time.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + spoke neither + 副词A + nor + 副词B

original.en: He answered me, but he spoke neither slowly nor clearly.
original.zh: 他回答了我，但他说得既不慢也不清楚。

imitations.en: The teacher spoke neither fast nor slowly.
imitations.zh: 老师说得既不快也不慢。

imitations.en: He wrote neither neatly nor clearly.
imitations.zh: 他写得既不工整也不清楚。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + not only + 动词/形容词, but + also + 动词/形容词 + as well

original.en: I not only spoke English very carefully, but very clearly as well.
original.zh: 我说英语不仅非常认真，而且非常清晰。

imitations.en: She not only works hard, but also smartly as well.
imitations.zh: 她不仅工作努力，而且聪明。

imitations.en: He not only came early, but also helped as well.
imitations.zh: 他不仅来得早，而且帮忙了。
